mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.title, c.content, c.summary, c.category_id AS categoryId, cat.name AS categoryName, c.author_id AS authorId, u.username AS authorName, c.status, c.content_type AS contentType, c.cover_image_id AS coverImageId, f.url AS coverImageUrl, c.view_count AS viewCount, c.sort, c.is_top AS isTop, c.is_hot AS isHot, c.publish_time AS publishTime, c.seo_title AS seoTitle, c.seo_keywords AS seoKeywords, c.seo_description AS seoDescription, c.create_time AS createTime, c.update_time AS updateTime FROM cms_content c LEFT JOIN cms_category cat ON c.category_id = cat.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_file f ON c.cover_image_id = f.id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.del_flag = 'F'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM cms_content WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND del_flag = 'F'
